functions.name: vizing.node_list_colouring_problem
documentation:
Return a constraint problem representing a node list-colouring instance.

```
param G

A graph with lists of permissible colours assigned to nodes.
```

\:return A node list-colouring constraint problem.

functions.name: vizing.node_list_colouring_solution
documentation:
Return a list-coloured graph.

```
param G

A graph with lists of permissible colours assigned to nodes.
```

\:return A properly list-coloured graph.

functions.name: vizing.edge_list_colouring_problem
documentation:
Return a constraint problem representing an edge list-colouring instance.

```
param G

A graph with lists of permissible colours assigned to edges.
```

\:return An edge list-colouring constraint problem.

functions.name: vizing.edge_list_colouring_solution
documentation:
Return an edge-coloured graph.

```
param G

A graph with lists of permissible colours assigned to edges.
```

\:return A properly edge list-coloured graph.

functions.name: vizing.total_list_colouring_problem
documentation:
Return a constraint problem representing a total list-colouring instance.

```
param G

A graph with lists of permissible colours assigned to nodes and edges.
```

\:return A total list-colouring constraint problem.

functions.name: vizing.total_list_colouring_solution
documentation:
Return a total list-coloured graph.

```
param G

A graph with lists of permissible colours assigned to nodes and edges.
```

\:return A properly total list-coloured graph.
